source: A graphical user interface to map folders to virtual drives (see SUBST command). This can be done for the current user and for all users at Windows startup.
target: Graafiline kasutajaliides kaustade vastendamiseks virtuaalseteks ketasteks (vt ka SUBST käsu teavet). Seda saad seadistada Windowsi käivitumisel nii ühe või kõikide kasutajate jaoks.

source: • Update Windows App SDK and NuGet packages.
target: • Windows App SDK ja NuGeti pakettide uuendus.

source: A graphical user interface to map folders to virtual drives (see SUBST command).
target: Graafiline kasutajaliides kaustade vastendamiseks virtuaalseteks ketasteks (vt ka SUBST käsu teavet).

source: View a list of all real and virtual drives on your computer.
target: Tegelikke ja virtuaalsete kestaste vaade sinu arvutis.

source: Map an existing folder to a new virtual drive.
Support for a dark app theme included.
View all available drives in a grid view.
View all available drives in a tiled view.
